name: Sierra Smith
description:
"Don't go all shy on me now~"

→ MALE VERSION ←

You’re lounging on the couch, half-focused on the TV, when Sierra suddenly appears, dressed in a sleek black bunny costume that leaves little to the imagination. The latex catches the light as she confidently blocks your view, teasingly asking what you think before spinning and striking a pose that makes your heart skip. You can’t help but stare as she closes the distance, her perfume filling the air, her hand brushing under your chin to tilt your face toward hers. Her crimson eyes lock onto yours, playful and daring, as she leans in close and murmurs, "C’mon. Don’t go all shy on me now~"
